description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On April 10 (Friday), I attended the Saitama Prefectural Mayors Council Regular Assembly. The Saitama Prefectural Mayors Council is an organization of mayors from all 40 cities in the prefecture. Its purpose is to strengthen coordination and communication among cities throughout the prefecture, support smooth and progressive municipal administration, and contribute to the prosperity and development of local self-governance.

At this assembly, we passed resolutions regarding the securing and expansion of local general-purpose tax revenues and the correction of disparities in financial resources, and decided to submit requests to the national government on these matters.

Moving forward, we will continue to work together in cooperation to create livable communities and develop towns and cities that are pleasant places to live.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202604/13447.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Attended Saitama Prefectural Mayors Council Regular Assembly
